shadowSentences: She loves to read every day.
We often go hiking on weekends.
They play soccer in the park.
He likes to cook new recipes.
I watch movies every Friday night.
She practices yoga to stay fit.
We travel to new countries each summer.
They volunteer at the local shelter together.
I think learning a new language is exciting.

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about travel planning.
questions: Q1: Can you tell me about a memorable trip you took?
Q2: What challenges did you face while planning that trip?
Q3: How do you feel about the importance of travel in life?
Q4: What advice would you give someone planning their first trip?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about exercise habits.
questions: Q1: What kind of physical activities do you enjoy?
Q2: Have you ever struggled to maintain a workout routine?
Q3: Why do you think staying active is important?
Q4: What suggestions do you have for someone starting to exercise?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about reading habits.
questions: Q1: What types of books do you like to read?
Q2: Have you encountered any difficulties in finding time to read?
Q3: In your opinion, how does reading benefit people?
Q4: What tips would you offer to someone looking to read more?
